usageFeesSetup.title: Configure usage fees
usageFeesSetup.subtitle: Lease settlement configuration for {parkName}
usageFeesSetup.notFoundDescription: The configuration data for this park could not be loaded.
usageFeesSetup.modeDescription: Determine how the usage fees for this park should be settled.
usageFeesSetup.networkModeDescription: The network company creates all invoices centrally and distributes the costs to the operator companies afterwards. This is the default settlement mode.
usageFeesSetup.directModeDescription: Individual operator companies settle the usage fees directly for specific owners. You can make the assignment in the next step.
usageFeesSetup.ownersDescription: Assign the settling company to each lease contract. Choose "network company" or an operator company for direct billing.
usageFeesSetup.warningNoPhases: No revenue phases configured. Please create at least one revenue phase.
usageFeesSetup.warningNoMinimumRent: No minimum rent per turbine configured. The minimum guarantee cannot be calculated.
usageFeesSetup.warningNoLeases: No lease contracts found for this park. Please create lease contracts first.
usageFeesSetup.warningNoOperators: No operator companies available. Operator companies are required for direct billing.
usageFeesSetup.leaseSummaryDescription: {count} lease contract(s) with {turbines} turbines on {area} m²

step1.cardDescription: Choose the wind park, accounting year and settlement type
step1.yearHint: Lease is settled retroactively - default is the previous year.
step1.advanceDescription: Regular advance payment based on minimum rent
step1.noLeases: No active lease contracts found for this park. Settlement is not possible.
step1.existingEmpty: No existing settlements for this park and year.

step2.advanceInfo: Advances are based on minimum rent. No revenue required.
step2.advanceYearlyDetail: The annual advance for {year} is calculated from the full annual minimum rent.
step2.advanceQuarterlyDetail: The quarterly advance Q{quarter} {year} is calculated as 1/4 of the annual minimum rent.
step2.advanceMonthlyDetail: The monthly advance {month} {year} is calculated as 1/12 of the annual minimum rent.
step2.revenueCardDescription: Choose the data source for the park's total revenue
step2.sourceAutoDescription: Use data from closed energy settlements
step2.sourceManualDescription: 12 months with EEG production, EEG revenue, DV production, DV revenue
step2.displayModeHint: Determines whether the revenue overview on the credit note shows yearly or monthly values (always with EEG/DV breakdown).
step2.noFinalizedHint: For automatic import, energy settlements with status "Invoiced" or "Closed" must exist. Alternatively, you can enter the data manually.
step2.manualTableDescription: Enter the EEG and DV values for each month.
step2.revenueManualHint: The data will be saved as energy settlements upon proceeding.
step2.revenueAutoHint: The exact allocation will be calculated in the next step (MAX rule).

step3.overpaymentWarningTitle: Warning: Overpayment for at least one lessor
step3.overpaymentWarningHint: A negative remainder means more advances were paid than the actual lease amount.

step4.summaryDescription: The lease settlement has been calculated and saved successfully.
step4.statusDraftHint: Credit notes are created as drafts and can be edited before sending.
step4.statusReleasedHint: Credit notes are marked as released directly and can be sent immediately.
step4.successDraftHint: All credit notes were created as drafts.
step4.successReleasedHint: All credit notes were marked as released.
step4.successAllocHint: Operator invoices were created as drafts.
